manifests.name: Gmail (v0.1 reference example)
manifests.description: Reference v0.1 install manifest for a Gmail tool with OAuth. Useful as a template for the legacy MCP-shaped manifest format; not a production-grade manifest.

manifests.name: Gmail (v0.2 reference example)
manifests.description: Reference v0.2 install manifest for a Gmail tool with OAuth. Demonstrates the structured actions[] catalog with input/output schemas, side-effects classification, and the action-call smoke test kind. Use this as the template when authoring new v0.2 manifests.
